creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
using python:env doesn't help for me.

without shebangfix I get 
Error: '/usr/bin/env python' is an invalid shebang...

with shebangfix I get
Error: '/usr/local/bin/python' is an invalid shebang...

If I change the shebang line to python3.9 make stage-qa doesn't give this error. So it would appear that stage-qa doesn't follow symlinks when checking the shebang destination.
